en.title: Prompt Optimizer
en.prompt: I am trying to get good results from GPT-5 on the following prompt: 'Your prompt.' Could you write a better prompt that is more optimal for GPT-5 and would produce better results?
en.remark: Let ChatGPT reverse the prompt. As the logic of human-written prompts differs from that of a machine, reworking the prompts will make ChatGPT easier to understand.

metaTitle: Prompt Optimizer: Refine for GPT-5 Results
metaDescription: Are your prompts failing? Use this reverse-engineering tool to rewrite and optimize your inputs for GPT-5. Get clearer, more accurate AI responses instantly!

faq.q: Is the rewritten prompt actually better? How do I compare?
faq.a: Run the same input through the original and the rewrite three times each, then compare stability, information density, and whether either goes off track. Rewrites sometimes just make the prompt wordier with identical or even worse results. Do not blindly trust AI-generated optimizations.

faq.q: If a prompt was rewritten for GPT-5, does it still work on Claude?
faq.a: It might, but it is rarely optimal. Different models have different sensitivities to prompt style: Claude responds better to clear task decomposition and XML tags, Gemini prefers explicit steps. If your target is not GPT-5, replace GPT-5 in the prompt with the actual model name and have it rewrite again.
